TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cikowa’ay, title = Cikowa’ay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cikowa’ay} }

S.FORM: alang Cikowa'ay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 163 buwan, 433 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 147 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 286 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 32%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cikowa'ay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cikowa'ay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cikowa'ay hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Cikowa'ay hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Cikowa'ay hya' ga Kawaliwali. tay mkyahu' na Cikowa'ay hya' ga Muliyaw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cikowa'ay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Cikowa'ay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 163 buwan, 433 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 147 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 286 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 32%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cikowa'ay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cikowa'ay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cikowa'ay hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Cikowa'ay hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Cikowa'ay hya' ga Kawaliwali. tay mkyahu' na Cikowa'ay hya' ga Muliyaw. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cikowa'ay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨikowaʔaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ikekami ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨikowaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨikowaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨikowaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨikowaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨikowaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa kawaliwali. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨikowaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa mulijaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨikowaʔaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
